global.description: The ad features a vibrant teal background with layered graphic elements and clear text.
global.main_message: Promoting travel bookings with flexible options and a discount.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A solid teal background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Main graphic element
elements.description: A large, abstract shape in the center, possibly a rectangle or rounded rectangle, with a soft edge.

elements.label: Secondary graphic element
elements.description: An oval shape positioned slightly above the main graphic element, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Additional graphic element
elements.description: Another rectangular shape, similar to the main subject but smaller, placed to the right of the main graphic.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon located at the top left, possibly representing a feature or service.

elements.label: Small circular icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon positioned towards the bottom center, complementing the overall design.

elements.label: Small circular icon
elements.description: A third small circular icon located towards the bottom right, maintaining symmetry in the design.

elements.label: Small graphic element
elements.description: A small rectangular shape positioned in the center, adding to the layered look of the ad.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold text at the top reading 'HorizonHop UGC', prominently displayed against the background.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Clear and inviting text in the center stating 'Book your next trip Flexible booking options'.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Flexible booking options

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Order now', designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small badge displaying '-30%' in a contrasting color, indicating a promotional offer.
